name: NOW Foods Vitamin C-1000 with Rose Hips
ingredients: Vitamin C (as Ascorbic Acid) 1000mg, Rose Hips (Rosa canina)(fruit) 25mg. Other Ingredients: Dicalcium Phosphate, Stearic Acid (vegetable source), Cellulose, Silicon Dioxide, Magnesium Stearate (vegetable source).

name: Natrol Melatonin Advanced Sleep 10mg
ingredients: Melatonin 10mg, Vitamin B6 (as Pyridoxine HCl) 10mg. Other Ingredients: Dicalcium Phosphate, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Stearic Acid (vegetable source), Silica, Magnesium Stearate (vegetable source).

name: Nordic Naturals Omega-3 Fish Oil 1000mg
ingredients: Fish Oil Concentrate (from anchovy and sardine) providing: EPA (Eicosapentaenoic Acid) 180mg, DHA (Docosahexaenoic Acid) 120mg. Other Ingredients: Gelatin (bovine), Glycerin, Water, d-Alpha Tocopherol, Rosemary Extract.

name: Optimum Nutrition Gold Standard 100% Whey Protein
ingredients: Whey Protein Isolate, Whey Protein Concentrate, Whey Peptides. Other Ingredients: Lecithin (Soy), Acesulfame Potassium, Sucralose, Natural and Artificial Flavors. Contains: Milk, Soy.

name: Doctor's Best 5-HTP 100mg from Griffonia
ingredients: 5-Hydroxytryptophan (5-HTP) 100mg (from Griffonia simplicifolia seed extract 200mg). Other Ingredients: Modified Cellulose (vegetable capsule), Microcrystalline Cellulose, Magnesium Stearate (vegetable source).

name: Jarrow Formulas DHEA 25mg
ingredients: Dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) 25mg. Other Ingredients: Microcrystalline Cellulose, Magnesium Stearate (vegetable source), Silicon Dioxide. Contains: No common allergens.

name: Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides Powder
ingredients: Bovine Hide Collagen Peptides. Other Ingredients: None. Contains: No common allergens. Collagen peptides sourced from grass-fed, pasture-raised bovine hides.

name: Nutrex Research Lipo-6 Black Intense
ingredients: Thermo-RX & Detox Amplifying Blend 695mg: Caffeine Anhydrous, Theobromine, Synephrine HCl (from Citrus aurantium 30%), Yohimbine HCl, Rauwolscine (Alpha-Yohimbine). Other Ingredients: Gelatin (capsule), Microcrystalline Cellulose, Magnesium Stearate, FD&C Red #40, FD&C Blue #1.
